case_title: S & C MOTORS INC. VS BAYVIEW AUTOMOTIVE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $509.91 FILED BY S & C MOTORS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW AUTOMOTIVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW AUTOMOTIVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S & C MOTORS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYVIEW AUTOMOTIVE $509.91 PRINCIPAL, $62.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $572.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
